failedPrompts.query: do sheet masks actually give you glowing skin or is it just temporary
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Sheet masks provide genuine temporary hydration and plumping that creates visible glow for 4-8 hours, making them perfect for events. For long-term results, use them 1-2 times weekly alongside a consistent hydrating routine with serums and moisturizers.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: Sheet masks can provide temporary hydration and glow, but for consistent results, regular hydrating skincare is more effective.

failedPrompts.query: is the face oil hype real or just marketing does it actually work
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Face oil is genuinely effective for dry skin and barrier repair when chosen correctly—squalane and jojoba oil have solid scientific backing. The hype is partially marketing, but quality oils like those from The Ordinary or Kosmea deliver real results at reasonable prices.

failedPrompts.query: honest review do sheet masks actually improve your skin long term
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Sheet masks provide temporary hydration boost but don't create permanent skin improvement without consistent routine use alongside serums and moisturizers. Use them 1-2 times weekly as supplements to your core routine for cumulative benefits over 4-6 weeks.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: While sheet masks temporarily boost hydration, long-term improvements are best supported by a consistent, comprehensive skincare routine.
